args.message: Come on over, friend! You're looking at a fantastic 2018 Toyota Prius Two, a real gem that sips gas like nobody's business. This one's been well-maintained and has a clean history – it's ready for a new home!

args.message: Alright, let's get down to brass tacks. For a 2018 Prius with 71,000 miles, I'm particularly interested in the health of the hybrid system. Can you tell me the age of the 12-volt battery, when the last hybrid battery health check was performed, and if there are any records of past battery module replacements? Also, what's the oil change interval you've followed, and have you noticed any oil consumption between changes?

text: Alright, let's get down to brass tacks. For a 2018 Prius with 71,000 miles, I'm particularly interested in the health of the hybrid system. Can you tell me the age of the 12-volt battery, when the last hybrid battery health check was performed, and if there are any records of past battery module replacements? Also, what's the oil change interval you've followed, and have you noticed any oil consumption between changes?

speaker: seller

args.message: Excellent questions! You're clearly someone who knows their way around a car, and I appreciate that. The hybrid system on these Priuses is legendary – practically bulletproof. We don't typically track the exact age of the 12-volt battery as it's designed to last a good long while, and this one is running perfectly. As for the hybrid battery health, it's also in top-notch shape. We haven't had any reason to perform any module replacements, and there are no records of that because it simply hasn't been an issue. For oil changes, we've been diligent, always following the manufacturer's recommended interval, and absolutely no oil consumption to speak of between changes. This car runs like a dream!
